The '''Storrd Township''' was a city on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Seregar]]. It was the closest thing to a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] that could be found on the entire planet, and visitors could stay in the [[Callamvor Hotel]]. The township had once been a prosperous [[Mining/Legends|mining]] town until the mines ran dry. Subsequent to this, most of the outskirts of the city were abandoned. The city was still frequented by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and other types of criminals.
